title: plectranthus elongatus
intro: Plectranthus elongatus, also known as Coleus elongatus, is a perennial plant species native to tropical Africa. It belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, headache, and digestive problems, and its extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The leaves of the Plectranthus elongatus plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to make herbal remedies for treating various ailments.
